title: AI-Driven Drug Discovery and Molecular Simulation
description: This program supports research using artificial intelligence and machine learning to accelerate drug discovery processes, including deep learning for molecular property prediction and simulation-based screening of candidate compounds.

title: Climate Adaptation Strategies for Rural Communities
description: Funding opportunity for interdisciplinary research on climate change adaptation in rural and underserved communities, focusing on sustainable agriculture, water management, and community resilience. Qualitative and mixed-methods designs encouraged.

title: STEM Education Innovation for K-12 Students
description: This opportunity supports proposals to develop and evaluate innovative STEM education programs for children and youth in underserved school districts. Research should employ experimental or survey-based methodologies.

title: Trustworthy AI: Fairness, Explainability, and Safety
description: NSF invites proposals addressing the development of trustworthy, explainable AI systems that are socially responsible and fair. Research should include mathematical foundations and theoretical analysis of algorithmic fairness.

title: Cybersecurity for Critical Infrastructure
description: This funding program supports research on cybersecurity, network security, and defense of critical digital infrastructure against emerging threats. Proposals may include simulation, machine learning methods, or experimental approaches.

title: Public Health Interventions for Older Adults
description: Supports clinical trials and community-based participatory research to improve health outcomes for older adults and seniors, with a focus on age-related disease prevention and health disparities.

title: Quantum Computing for Materials Discovery
description: Research opportunity for quantum computing and quantum simulation approaches to accelerate materials science discovery, including advanced nanomaterials and polymer design.

title: NLP and Language Technologies for Accessibility
description: This program funds research on natural language processing and computational linguistics to develop assistive technology for persons with disabilities, including text analysis tools and language models for diverse populations.

title: Data Science for Pandemic Preparedness
description: Supports data-driven research using big data analytics and machine learning to improve epidemic forecasting, outbreak detection, and public health emergency response coordination.

title: Robotics and Human-Robot Interaction in Healthcare
description: Funding for research on robotic systems and human-robot interaction for healthcare settings, including autonomous robots for surgical assistance and rehabilitation for older adults and veterans.

title: Community Resilience and Indigenous Knowledge Systems
description: This program supports action research and community-based participatory research with indigenous and tribal communities to document traditional ecological knowledge and develop sustainable environmental conservation strategies.

title: SBIR Phase I: Clean Energy Technology Innovation
description: Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) Phase I awards for startup companies developing clean energy, renewable technology, and green technology solutions. Focus on technology transfer and commercialization of sustainable innovations.

title: Genomics and Bioinformatics for Precision Medicine
description: Research funding for genome sequencing, proteomics, and bioinformatics approaches to advance precision medicine, with particular attention to health disparities in underserved populations.

title: International Collaboration on AI Safety and Governance
description: Supports bilateral and multilateral international cooperation on responsible AI governance, ethical AI development, and global partnership for AI safety standards.

title: Computer Vision for Environmental Monitoring
description: This program supports image recognition and object detection research using deep neural networks for environmental monitoring, biodiversity assessment, and conservation applications.

title: Workforce Training in Advanced Manufacturing
description: Supports workforce development and professional development programs in advanced manufacturing, materials science, and engineering research for women in STEM and underrepresented groups.

title: Mental Health Services for Immigrant and Refugee Youth
description: Research on mental health interventions for immigrant and refugee children and adolescents, using mixed methods and community-based participatory approaches to understand the needs of displaced populations.

title: Foundation Models for Scientific Discovery
description: Supports research on foundation models and generative models for accelerating scientific discovery, including interdisciplinary applications in chemistry, physics, and biology.

title: Broadband Access and Digital Equity
description: Funding for research and deployment of broadband and cyberinfrastructure solutions to close the digital divide in rural communities and underserved areas, with focus on high-performance computing access.

title: Federated Learning for Privacy-Preserving Health Analytics
description: This program supports federated learning and machine learning approaches for privacy-preserving analysis of health data across multiple institutions, with emphasis on trustworthy and socially responsible AI applications.
